notes: Version 1.1.0 — Captain Mode. Pick captains and draft a 5-player roster per side from the player database (max 4 picks per team), with team name auto-fill, per-team color picker, total points readout once a side is full, and a Discord post that captures only the two team columns. Adds in-app update install with progress + auto-relaunch (future updates from 1.1.0 onward will install with one click). Window controls now match the tab pills along the header bar.
